scope: RCCD realizations on the frozen bounded candidate and cross-feature composition scope; transformations must be commitment-equivalent and effectively recoverable.

executed_transformations.name: event_state_interchange
executed_transformations.obligation: events reified as states and states factored as event boundaries preserve commitments, admissibility, dependencies, supersession, and recovery

executed_transformations.name: semantic_dualization
executed_transformations.obligation: intensional rules and extensional admissible-transition sets are bidirectionally recoverable without collapsing semantic versions

executed_transformations.name: causal_intervention_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: grounds and dependencies mapped to structural assignments and interventions preserve counterfactual distinctions and revision provenance

executed_transformations.name: proof_object_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: accepted evolutions represented by proof objects preserve premises, discharge conditions, rejected alternatives, and supersession

executed_transformations.name: type_theoretic_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: commitments and admissibility represented by indexed types preserve semantic versions, dependency indices, and historical identity

executed_transformations.name: process_algebra_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: parallel composition, synchronization, hiding, and labeled actions preserve observable commitments and do not hide charged schedulers

executed_transformations.name: coalgebraic_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: behavioral observations and evolution maps preserve finite-query recovery, dependencies, and non-equivalent hidden-state distinctions

executed_transformations.name: history_event_sourcing_encoding
executed_transformations.obligation: snapshot and append-only event-sourced forms are bidirectionally recoverable without retroactive rewriting

executed_transformations.name: probability_representation_change
executed_transformations.obligation: kernel, sampler-with-certificate, and cylinder-measure forms preserve bounded expectations, conditioning, and certified tails

executed_transformations.name: partial_observation_factorization
executed_transformations.obligation: hidden-state, belief-state, and observation-history forms preserve declared epistemic limits and do not promote observational equivalence to identity

executed_transformations.name: continuous_discrete_time_normalization
executed_transformations.obligation: hybrid flow/jump, timed-transition, and sampled-trace forms preserve guards, clocks, interpolation obligations, and semantic events

executed_transformations.name: history_rechunking_and_state_factorization
executed_transformations.obligation: chunk boundaries and factorization choices preserve all registered recovery queries and cost ledgers

nonclaims: RCCD is invariant under every conceivable encoding
RCCD is globally necessary, minimal, unique, or universal
